info.title: Hermem API
info.description: Persistent graph memory for LLM agents. SQLite. Embeddings. Graph traversal. One binary.

post.description: Batch re-embed all entities after model/dimension change.

get.description: Louvain community detection with modularity scoring.
BFS-based connected components in the graph.
All contradicts edges. Optional ?id=X filters to specific entity.

post.description: Roll back the most recently applied migration.

get.description: Stored vs current schema fingerprint comparison.
Checksum integrity check across all migrations.

post.description: Add a typed edge between two entities. Set auto_create=true to create missing entities.

get.description: Checks entities, edges, embeddings, orphan edges, invalid types.
Basic liveness check — no DB hit beyond the open connection. Always returns 200.
Runs dependency checks (DB, vector index, embedder, LLM extractor, disk). Returns 503 on critical failure.

post.description: Extract entities from dialog text, deduplicate, and store.

get.description: Filter entities by memory origin (conversation_id, message_id, source).

post.description: Embed → search → graph walk → markdown context.
Full pipeline filtered by time range (RFC3339).

get.description: Walk recovers_via chain from a failed task.

post.description: Walk the graph from seed entities and return ranked results.
Find entities most similar to the query by cosine similarity.
Upsert an entity. Embedding is computed automatically if omitted.
Create a new task entity, optionally linked to context entities.
Add or remove a dependency edge between tasks.
Pending tasks whose blocked_by dependencies are all completed.
Find the task linked via recovers_via from a failed task.
Returns task entity plus blocked_by and recovers_via edges.
Transition a task entity to a new lifecycle state.
ASCII rendering of the task dependency tree.
